name: Queen Scones
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the whole wheat flour, baking powder, salt, and sugar in a large bowl.
2. Mix well until combined.
3. Stir in the oil and raisins.
4. In a separate bowl, mix the tofu and water until smooth.
5. Pour the blended mixture into the dry ingredients and stir until just combined.
6. Turn the dough out onto a floured surface and roll it out to about 1/2-inch thickness.
7. Cut into scones using a knife or cookie cutter.
8. Place the scones on a lightly oiled baking sheet.
9. Bake at 425°F (220°C) for 15 minutes, or until golden brown.
